item_id: # Header-only template for the W1 hand-authored Hawaiian micro-eval (~50–100 items).
# This file intentionally contains no Hawaiian content. Real items live off-git at
# data/evals/manual_w1/w1-haw-micro-eval.tsv (see data/ is gitignored) and must be
# hand-authored or copied from rights-cleared sources with per-row citation.
#   item_id            stable id, e.g. w1-okina-001 (kebab-case, category-prefixed)
#   category           one of: okina_survival | kahako_retention | unicode_nfc | generation_sanity
#   prompt             the model input (Hawaiian or English depending on probe)
#   reference          gold continuation / answer / expected substring; may be empty for open-ended sanity probes
#   diacritic_density  count of ʻokina (U+02BB) + kahakō vowels (ā ē ī ō ū) in prompt+reference
#   notes              what this item is testing; cite source if quoted from rights-cleared text
#   author             initials of the human author/reviewer
#   review_status      draft | reviewed | accepted (only `accepted` rows are run)
#   nfc_normalized     true | false — must be true before commit; verified by NFC check at load time
# Lines beginning with `#` are comments and are stripped at load time. Tabs separate fields.
# Do not commit populated rows to git; this template stays empty.
